<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>根據我得到的資訊，

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>From what I've learned so far, a
<Color=red>legendary sword <Color=white>exists somewhere
in Hyrule.
And it's highly likely to be found in the
<Color=red>something-something woods<Color=white>.

<unk[3:0:10]><unk[4:0:16 84 105 114 101 100 95 48 49]>So, that much I know, but where might
woods of a something-something
nature be?
I have to find the sword soon and return
to my wife, Sorelia, at Lakeside Stable.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 76]>少来了！你还真不擅长开玩笑呢！

<Color=grey><Size=80>……咦？<unk[5:0]>难道……<unk[5:0]>这真的……<unk[5:0]>就是……<unk[5:0]>传说中的剑？<Size=100><Color=white>

<unk[3:0:10]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 48]>这……这样啊……<Color=grey><Size=80><unk[5:0]><Size=100><Color=white>
看来是你先找到了这把剑啊。
而且既然你拿着这把剑，
也就代表你才是被选中的人……
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>好！<unk[5:0]>传说中的剑就托付给你了！<unk[5:0]>

等我找一件能够取代传说中的剑的好武器！

<Color=grey><Size=80>咦？<unk[5:0]>難不成……<unk[5:0]>是真的？<unk[5:0]>那就是<unk[5:0]>傳說中的劍？<Size=100><Color=white>

<unk[3:0:10]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 48]>這……<Size=80><unk[5:0]><Size=100>這樣啊……<Size=80><unk[5:0]><Size=100>
是你先找到了劍的下落……
而且也拿起了劍，
這證明了你才是被選上的人……
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>好吧！<unk[5:0]>那傳說中的劍就託付給你了！<unk[5:0]>

rows.JPja:

<Color=grey><Size=80>…え？ まさか？ <unk[5:0]><Ruby={4:8}ほんとう>本当に？ <unk[5:0]>それが？ <unk[5:0]><Ruby={4:8}でんせつ>伝説の<Ruby={2:6}つるぎ>剣？<Size=100><Color=white>

オレは オレの<Ruby={4:8}たいせつ>大切な<Ruby={2:4}つま>妻 オゼーユを<Ruby={2:4}まも>守る！<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={4:8}でんせつ>伝説の<Ruby={2:6}つるぎ>剣に<Ruby={2:2}か>代わる<Ruby={2:4}なに>何かいい<Ruby={4:4}ぶき>武器を<Ruby={2:2}て>手に<Ruby={2:2}い>入れてな！

<Color=grey><Size=80>But...<unk[5:0]>uh...<unk[5:0]>is it?<unk[5:0]> It is.<unk[5:0]> The sword of legend.<Size=100><Color=white>


<unk[3:0:10]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 48]>I... <Color=grey><Size=80><unk[5:0]><Size=100><Color=white>I see...<Color=grey><Size=80><unk[5:0]><Size=100><Color=white> So, you got to it first.


And the fact that you're wielding
the sword means that YOU are the
chosen one.
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>All right, then!<unk[5:0]> Let it be known that you
are an important person, <unk[5:0]>because the
legendary sword protects such persons!
Now, I must protect my important wife,
Sorelia!<unk[5:0]> I vow to get a worthy weapon in
place of the legendary sword!
